LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF SHREE JALARAM HOTEL, LP'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-20-583235 WITH CASE CGC-20-588591 IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 501 TO BE HEARD AT 9:30 A.M. ON THE SAME DAY. THAT DEPARTMENT HANDLES REAL PROPERTY ACTIONS PER SF LOCAL RULE 8.10A1. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/HK)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-20-583235 WITH CASE CGC-20-588591 IS GRANTED. THE ACTIONS ARE CONSOLIDATED FOR ALL PURPOSES, AND CGC-20-583235 SHALL BE THE LEAD CASE AND THEREFORE LISTED FIRST IN THE CAPTION OF ALL FUTURE PLEADINGS. NO OPPOSITION FILED. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; NOT REPORTED. (D501)
PARTIES/ATTORNEYS FROM CONSOLIDATED CASE #CGC-20-588591 ADDED TO LEAD CASE #CGC-20-583235 FOR MAILING OF COURT NOTICES.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-25-2022 Vacated

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-20-583235 WITH CASE CGC-20-588591
Off Calendar Mar-11-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF SHREE JALARAM HOTEL, LP'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-20-583235 WITH CASE CGC-20-588591 is Transferred to department 501 to be heard at 9:30 a.m. on the same day. That department handles real property actions per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/HK)

Motion To Consolidate Actions Of Case(S) Cgc-20-583235 With Case Cgc-20-588591
Off Calendar Mar-11-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-20-583235 WITH CASE CGC-20-588591 is GRANTED. The actions are consolidated for all purposes, and CGC-20-583235 shall be the lead case and therefore listed first in the caption of all future pleadings. No opposition filed.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
